organization: Future Generali India Insurance Company Limited

benefits.name: Hospitalization Expenses
benefits.description: Medical Expenses necessarily incurred for hospitalization in India for Medically Necessary Treatment required due to an Illness or Injury.

benefits.name: Medical Treatment Abroad
benefits.description: Medical Expenses incurred by the Insured Person for treatment outside India.

benefits.name: Emergency Ambulance Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for reasonable and customary charges for ambulance services for transportation to the nearest hospital.

benefits.name: OPD Treatment
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred on OPD treatment for illness, injury, or maternity.

benefits.name: Dental Treatment
benefits.description: Reimbursement for dental expenses including fillings, root canal treatment, and dentures.

benefits.name: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred up to 60 days prior to hospitalization.

benefits.name: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred up to 180 days after discharge from hospitalization.

benefits.name: Domiciliary Hospitalization Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred during domiciliary hospitalization for a continuous period of at least 3 days.

benefits.name: Maternity Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for maternity expenses incurred for delivery, subject to certain conditions.

benefits.name: Organ Donor Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred for organ donor treatment when the Insured Person is the recipient.

benefits.name: Day Care Treatment Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred for day care treatments.

benefits.name: Accidental Hospitalization
benefits.description: Increase in sum insured by 25% for hospitalization due to an accident.

benefits.name: Child Vaccination Benefits
benefits.description: Reimbursement for vaccination expenses for children up to 12 years of age.

benefits.name: Newborn Baby Expenses
benefits.description: Reimbursement for medical expenses incurred for the newborn baby if a maternity claim is accepted.

exclusions.name: Pre-existing Diseases
exclusions.description: Waiting period of 2 years is applicable from the date of inception of the Policy.

exclusions.name: Treatment of Illnesses in USA and Canada
exclusions.description: Costs incurred for treatments in USA and Canada are excluded unless specified otherwise.

exclusions.name: Pre-Existing Disease
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy.

exclusions.name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of the listed conditions; surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24/48 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy.

exclusions.name: 30 Days Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident.
